hero.title: Master Solana Development
hero.subtitle: From Zero to Production dApps
hero.description: Interactive courses, on-chain credentials, and a community of builders. The most comprehensive Solana learning platform in Latin America.

landing.pathDescription: Structured tracks designed to take you from beginner to expert in specific Solana domains.
landing.whyDescription: The most complete Solana learning platform — built by the community, for the community.
landing.whySubtitle: Built by the Solana community for the Solana community.
landing.trustSubtitle: Hear from developers who transformed their careers
landing.readyDescription: Join thousands of builders learning Solana. Start your first course today and earn on-chain credentials.
landing.howDescription: From zero to on-chain credentials in four simple steps.
landing.step1Desc: Sign in with Phantom, Solflare, or any Solana wallet in one click.
landing.step2Desc: Pick from curated learning paths — from Solana basics to advanced DeFi.
landing.step3Desc: Write real Solana programs in our embedded code editor with live feedback.
landing.step4Desc: Get soulbound NFT credentials and XP tokens on Solana devnet.
landing.codePreviewDesc: Our embedded Monaco Editor gives you a full IDE experience. Write Rust and TypeScript with syntax highlighting, autocompletion, and real-time error feedback.
landing.codeFeature3: Pass/fail test cases with visual feedback
landing.codeFeature4: Pre-populated starter code for each challenge
landing.interactiveCodingDesc: Learn by doing with embedded code editors, real-time feedback, and hands-on challenges that deploy to Solana devnet.
landing.onChainCredentialsDesc: Earn verifiable soulbound NFT credentials as you progress. Your achievements live on the Solana blockchain forever.
landing.gamifiedLearningDesc: Earn XP, maintain streaks, collect achievements, and climb the leaderboard. Learning has never been this engaging.
landing.globalCommunityDesc: Join builders across Latin America and beyond. Learn in Portuguese, Spanish, or English with a vibrant peer community.
landing.gamificationDesc: Earn soulbound XP tokens (Token-2022, non-transferable) as you complete lessons. Your level is calculated on-chain: Level = floor(sqrt(XP / 100)). Compete on the leaderboard and unlock achievements.
landing.credentialDesc: Every course completion mints a soulbound Metaplex Core NFT to your wallet. These credentials are non-transferable and evolve as you progress.
landing.credFeature1: Soulbound (PermanentFreezeDelegate) — cannot be sold or transferred
landing.credFeature2: One NFT per track that upgrades in place as you level up
landing.credFeature3: On-chain attributes: track, level, courses completed, total XP
landing.credFeature4: Verifiable on Solana Explorer — share your proof with employers
landing.faq1A: No! Our courses start from zero. We teach you everything from setting up a wallet to deploying production dApps on Solana.
landing.faq2A: Yes, all courses are completely free. You only need a Solana wallet with a small amount of devnet SOL for on-chain interactions.
landing.faq3A: The platform supports English, Portuguese (PT-BR), and Spanish (ES). All UI elements, navigation, and descriptions are fully translated.
landing.faq4A: They are soulbound NFTs (non-transferable) minted on Solana that prove your course completion. They evolve as you progress through a learning track.
landing.faq5Q: Can I use any Solana wallet?
landing.faq5A: Yes! We support Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, and any wallet compatible with the Solana Wallet Adapter standard.
landing.testimonial1: Superteam Academy took me from zero Solana knowledge to building production dApps in 3 months. The on-chain credentials opened doors I never expected.
landing.testimonial2: The interactive challenges are brilliant. Instead of watching videos, you're actually writing and deploying code. The gamification keeps you coming back every day.
landing.testimonial3: The security track is world-class. I found my first real vulnerability after completing the audit course. The credential NFT on my profile helped land my current job.
